texto: What makes humility so desirable is the marvelous thing it does to us
autor: it creates in us a capacity for the closest possible intimacy with God.
explicacao: Citação de it creates in us a capacity for the closest possible intimacy with God. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “What makes humility so desirable is the marvelous thing it does to us” articula reflexao, monica-baldwin, makes em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
